# mds-horizontal-scroll



<!-- Auto Generated Below -->


## Properties

| Property    | Attribute   | Description                                                        | Type                                     | Default     |
| ----------- | ----------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------ | ---------------------------------------- | ----------- |
| `scrollbar` | `scrollbar` | Specifies the box’s snap position as an alignment of its snap area | `boolean`                                | `undefined` |
| `snap`      | `snap`      | Specifies the box’s snap position as an alignment of its snap area | `"center" \| "end" \| "none" \| "start"` | `'start'`   |


## CSS Custom Properties

| Name                           | Description                                                              |
| ------------------------------ | ------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| `--background`                 | Sets the background-color of the component                               |
| `--scrollbar-margin`           | Sets the margin of the browser scroll bar (if supported)                 |
| `--scrollbar-radius`           | Sets the border-radius of the browser scroll bar (if supported)          |
| `--scrollbar-size`             | Sets the height and width of the browser scroll bar (if supported)       |
| `--scrollbar-thumb-background` | Sets the background-color of the browser scroll bar thumb (if supported) |
| `--scrollbar-track-background` | Sets the background-color of the browser scroll bar track (if supported) |
